summary: Completed comprehensive testing of orbit animation feature - all requirements successfully implemented and working
passed_tests: Orbit circle with dashed teal border (#2dd4bf) visible and correctly styled
9 platform logos orbiting around Mario as expected
Logos maintain vertical orientation with counter-rotation working perfectly
Mario SVG remains centered and visible
Responsive design works on desktop (1920x1080), tablet (768x1024), and mobile (390x844)
Teal color scheme (#2dd4bf) properly applied with 17 elements using the color
Animation durations match specifications (20s for both orbit and counter-spin)
Visual effects including glow, particles, and holographic styling working
